source_pr.title: fix issue 108
source_pr.body:
Fix issue: https://github.com/pingcap/tidb/issues/108
Refactor update.go and support multiple-table syntax.

I change update syntax according to https://dev.mysql.com/doc/refman/5.7/en/update.html. There should be a "SET" in update statement. So some of tidb_test should be changed.

symptoms: {"UPDATE t SET id = id + 1 ORDER BY id DESC;", true}, (parser/parser_test.go)
failure_signature: {"UPDATE t SET id = id + 1 ORDER BY id DESC;", true}, (parser/parser_test.go)
root_cause_explanation: INSUFFICIENT_EVIDENCE: This PR (fix issue 108) appears to be primarily a functional/correctness change or refactor. The current evidence does not include a concrete flaky signature or a targeted stabilization change, so we conservatively mark it as insufficient_evidence.
fix_pattern: N/A (insufficient evidence; no targeted stabilization change identified).

evidence: evidence: {"UPDATE t SET id = id + 1 ORDER BY id DESC;", true}, (parser/parser_test.go)

files: parser/parser.y, parser/parser_test.go, plan/plans/index.go, stmt/stmts/update.go, Makefile, expression/expressions/assign.go, expression/expressions/ident.go, stmt/stmts/create_test.go, stmt/stmts/insert.go, stmt/stmts/update_test.go, plan/plans/join.go
